title: Using gantt charts to track individual jobs
excerpt: I would like to have one gantt chart per project to track our work for each job.  Would I add a new board for each project, or is there a better way to do this?

posts.author: mattrecov (Matt Kadwell)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to have one gantt chart per project to track our work for each job. Would I add a new board for each project, or is there a better way to do this?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @mattrecov - there are a number of ways you could design this. The easiest way would be as you mention, to have a separate Gantt view within each project board. If you have all your projects in one board, you can also use the Gantt view and filter the data as needed.

If you do not have multiple project boards, you can use a separate dashboard with a Gantt widget, and tie in the boards which have the project data and use filters on the widget to display the individual project data.

Basically, there are lots of options

Hope this helps!
Mark
